title: Mock Test 44 - Idioms (Set 1)
description: Idioms (Set 1) নিয়ে ২০টি প্রশ্ন। Piece of cake, Break a leg, Hit the nail on the head, Once in a blue moon, Cost an arm and a leg, Under the weather, Let the cat out of the bag ইত্যাদি।

questions.question: 'Piece of cake' idiom-টির অর্থ কী?
questions.explanation: 'Piece of cake' = very easy। যেমন: The exam was a piece of cake।

questions.question: 'Break a leg' idiom-টি কখন ব্যবহার করা হয়?
questions.explanation: 'Break a leg' = Good luck! (theater/performance-এর আগে)

questions.question: 'Hit the nail on the head' idiom-টির অর্থ কী?
questions.explanation: 'Hit the nail on the head' = exactly right।

questions.question: 'Once in a blue moon' idiom-টির অর্থ কী?
questions.explanation: 'Once in a blue moon' = very rarely / খুবই কম।

questions.question: 'Cost an arm and a leg' idiom-টির অর্থ কী?
questions.explanation: 'Cost an arm and a leg' = very expensive।

questions.question: The test was a ___ . I finished in 5 minutes!
questions.explanation: খুব সহজ → 'piece of cake'।

questions.question: She ___ and told everyone about the surprise.
options: let the cat out of the bag
questions.explanation: গোপন ফাঁস → 'let the cat out of the bag'।

questions.question: He visits home ___ — maybe once a year.
questions.explanation: বছরে একবার = খুব কমই → 'once in a blue moon'।

questions.question: I'm feeling ___ . I think I caught a cold.
questions.explanation: অসুস্থ/খারাপ লাগা → 'under the weather'।

questions.question: You ___! You got the highest score!
questions.explanation: 'Break a leg!' = শুভকামনা/অভিনন্দন।

questions.question: Error: 'The exam was a piece of cake, so I struggled a lot.' — সমস্যা?
questions.explanation: অর্থের বিরোধ।

questions.question: Error: 'He hit the nail on the head when he guessed my age wrong.' — ভুল?
options: hit = সঠিক, guessed wrong = ভুল — বিরোধ
questions.explanation: 'Hit the nail on the head' = সঠিক বলা, 'guessed wrong' = ভুল — বিরোধ।

questions.question: Error: 'This diamond ring costs an arm and a leg.' — সঠিক?
options: ভুল, cost arm and leg health-এর জন্য
questions.explanation: 'Cost an arm and a leg' = খুব দামি — হীরার আংটির জন্য সঠিক।

questions.question: Error: 'I see him once in a blue moon' — মানে?
questions.explanation: 'Once in a blue moon' = very rarely = খুব কমই।

questions.question: Fill: 'Don't worry. It will be a ___ of cake.'
questions.explanation: Fixed idiom: 'a piece of cake'।

questions.question: Fill: 'She was ___ the weather, so she stayed home.'
questions.explanation: 'Under the weather' = অসুস্থ।

questions.question: Fill: 'You ___ the nail on the head with that answer.'
questions.explanation: 'Hit the nail on the head' = exactly right।

questions.question: Fill: 'That car costs ___ arm and a leg.'
questions.explanation: 'Cost an arm and a leg' — 'an' (arm vowel sound দিয়ে শুরু)।

questions.question: অনুবাদ (idiom): 'পরীক্ষাটা খুব সহজ ছিল।'
options: The exam was a hard nut.
The exam was a piece of cake.
The exam was a long story.
The exam was a wild goose chase.
questions.explanation: 'A piece of cake' = খুব সহজ।

questions.question: অনুবাদ (idiom): 'সে খুবই কম ইংরেজি বলে।'
options: She speaks English once in a blue moon.
She speaks English all the time.
questions.explanation: 'Once in a blue moon' = খুব কমই।
